title: medicago × varia var. pseudosativa
intro: Medicago × varia var. pseudosativa, also known as red clover, is a perennial legume native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include isoflavones, coumarins, and flavonoids that have been shown to have anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of red clover include reducing symptoms of menopause, alleviating osteoporosis, and supporting cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-aging properties. Red clover can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in herbal infusions and salves for topical application.
